compiled_state.title: Add shared behavioral testing standard reference to sprint task-execution and review resolution prompts
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update sprint task execution and review resolution prompts to reference and consume the shared behavioral testing standard.

### Steps
1. In `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md` Step 4 (Test validation):
   - Add reference: "Consult plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md for the 4-rule behavioral testing standard when writing or modifying tests"
   - Ensure the shared standard's rules are referenced, not duplicated
2. In review resolution prompts (if applicable), add the same reference for test-writing during fix resolution

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md` — Edit

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Task-execution prompt references shared standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
